results.title: Council postpones eminent domain resolution targeting Puna land
results.description: The Hawaii County Council on Wednesday agreed to postpone a resolution calling for the acquisition of 3.74 acres of coastal Puna land using eminent domain to widen Government Beach Road — a measure described by opposition testifiers as “criminal” and an attempt to “trample” on the landowner’s rights. The post Council postpones eminent domain resolution targeting Puna land appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Another delay in Big Island fireworks-smuggling case
results.description: More than six months after their initial appearances in federal court in Honolulu, two East Hawaii men charged with illegally importing fireworks into Hawaii from the mainland and distributing them haven’t entered pleas to the charges. The post Another delay in Big Island fireworks-smuggling case appeared first on Hawaii Tribune-Herald .

results.title: Proposal Seeks $100,000 Cap on Social Security Benefits for Couples
results.description: Over a million retired couples receive more than $100,000 in Social Security benefits each year. Capping benefits would help, in part, to extend Social Security's funding cliff.

results.title: UH ace Magdaleno enters portal as backup to MLB draft dream

results.title: Trump administration to pay $765 million to scrap four more offshore wind leases
results.description: WASHINGTON — The Interior Department said Wednesday that it would pay the energy developer Invenergy hundreds of millions of dollars to abandon plans to build wind farms in the Atlantic and Pacific, in the third such deal struck by the Trump administration to cancel offshore wind leases. results.title: AI will lead to labour shortages, Bezos says in optimistic talk
results.description: PARIS (Reuters) — Artificial Intelligence will lead to labour shortages, not the replacement of humans, Amazon founder Jeff Bezos predicted in a highly optimistic appearance at the VivaTech technology conference in Paris on Wednesday. The post AI will lead to labour shortages, Bezos says in optimistic talk appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Death rate in ICE immigrant detention centers more than doubles under Trump
results.description: A Vietnamese man with cardiovascular problems collapsed and died in the “Speedway Slammer,” the repurposed Indiana maximum-security prison that’s become a symbol of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. In a Pennsylvania detention center, a Chinese man who had previously attempted suicide was found hanging in the shower. In a New York facility, a Honduran man with an elevated heart rate and tremors from alcohol withdrawal died in his cell with no emergency care. The post Death rate in ICE immigrant detention centers more than doubles under Trump appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Warsh kicks off Fed chief tenure with sweeping review as rates remain unchanged
results.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh opened a new era on Wednesday, with officials agreeing to leave interest rates unchanged despite inflation stuck well above their target but also launching an ambitious reform agenda to reshape how the U.S. central bank conducts and communicates monetary policy. Warsh, who took over as Fed chief last month, made an immediate imprint in organizing a unanimous consensus around a stripped-down policy statement that jettisoned any forward guidance on what actions the central bank might take in the near term, although new quarterly projections, eschewed by Warsh himself, showed nine of 19 policymakers now anticipate a rate hike by the end of 2026. Indeed, the shortened document issued by the central bank’s Federal Open Market Committee heralded a return to a format similar to that used by former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan and clearly reflected Warsh’s disdain for expansive communication about what’s to come. The post Warsh kicks off Fed chief tenure with sweeping review as rates remain unchanged appeared first on West Hawaii Today .

results.title: Mangione to use emotional disturbance as defense in murder trial
results.description: NEW YORK — Luigi Mangione’s lawyers plan to argue that he was experiencing “extreme emotional disturbance” when he killed a UnitedHealthcare executive in midtown Manhattan in 2024, a state judge said Wednesday. results.title: US details agreement with Iran as Trump departs G7 summit
results.description: The terms of the preliminary agreement between the United States and Iran would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, outline a $300 billion plan for Iran’s reconstruction and lift restrictions on the country’s oil exports, according to details described by a senior U.S. official Wednesday. results.title: Off the news: Reflect on Black history this Juneteenth
results.description: Friday is Juneteenth, a federal holiday that celebrates the abolition of slavery, freedom and Black history. In Hawaii, federal offices will be closed — but note that June 19 is not a paid state holiday, but is officially a day of remembrance and reflection.

results.title: Column: Forget LNG, isle residents require energy affordability now
results.description: The growing debate on Oahu about our energy future has become distracted by arguments over saving a few pennies on liquefied natural gas (LNG) seven or eight years from now, while ignoring the most pertinent issue: energy affordability right now.

results.title: Editorial: Work together to help keiki thrive
results.description: Last Thursday, this newspaper featured three very intriguing stories — seemingly unrelated at first blush, but upon closer look, quite connected in what they portend for Hawaii’s keiki, the next generation and this state’s future.

results.title: On patrol with Tokyo’s litter police
results.description: TOKYO >> It was a cloudy afternoon in Shibuya, one of Tokyo’s busiest areas, and a team of city officials was on high alert. They scanned the crowds, looking to catch anyone littering and to deliver on-the-spot fines — part of a new campaign to encourage better behavior among visitors.

results.title: Grading the internet's dating advice (Matthew Yglesias/Slow Boring)
results.description: Matthew Yglesias / Slow Boring : Grading the internet's dating advice — Every young person needs a married political pundit's take on dating — I'm officially #old so haven't been in the market for dating advice since before the emergence of modern short-form video and swiping-based apps.
